description_long: This is a small, white, plastic bottle of Johnson & Johnson liquid lotion, featuring a cylindrical screw-on cap that is slightly discolored at the top. The front of the bottle displays blue printed text, including the product name 'crema liquida' and the Johnson & Johnson logo, with additional product information in Italian. The bottle has a gently curved, ergonomic shape that narrows at the neck and widens at the base, making it easy to grip. The back side is densely covered with blue text, providing usage instructions and product details. The surface of the bottle appears matte with some signs of wear and minor staining, especially around the cap area. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements aside from the printed text.
description: A small, white, plastic Johnson & Johnson liquid lotion bottle with blue printed text and a screw-on cap, showing signs of wear and staining.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bottle's narrow, curved profile and the cylindrical cap, with minimal visible text.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main blue product label, 'crema liquida Johnson & Johnson', and the bottle's ergonomic shape.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the bottle's slim, curved silhouette and the cap, with little to no text visible.
description_view_3: Back view featuring dense blue text with product information and instructions, and the cap's slightly stained top.

license_info.creator_display_name: Archeoplastica: il museo dei rifiuti spiaggiati
